subject: Art and Design
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Facilitate group discussions to compare different artistic styles and perspectives.
topics: Expected standard: Pioneers of Zambian Visual Arts identified appropriately
activities: Learning Environment set up: in-door, out-door 1(natural, artificial and technological)
resources: Drawing paper, sketchbooks, coloured pencils, paints, and brushes
Activity 1: Identifying Art Elements (Line, shape, space, value, texture, tone and colour).
Task1: Learners to identify, discuss and analyse Art Elements.
assessment: artists (sculptors, painters, graphic designers, potters…) and their works.
This subtopic looked at Some of the pioneers of Zambian Visual Artists which included
Henry Tayali, Gabriel Ellison, Cynthia Zukas, Akwila Simpasa, Godfrey Setti, Shadreck
Simukanga, Martin Abasi Phiri as well as their works.
